rationale: The citing paper’s core method uses self-stated auxiliary attribute-status data and respondent-level customized conjoint design, while the cited paper is a methodological contribution on adaptive self-explication for multiattribute preference elicitation. This strong methodological/topical overlap (adaptive conjoint elicitation, attribute-importance information, predictive validation) makes it plausibly a method/foundation source rather than an incidental mention. With only a DOI-level match and no in-text snippet, it is not safely droppable as obvious background-only.
